The native verifier checked 4096 width-8 affine-loss gradient samples against finite differences and returned pass; the Form receipt band proved the receipt shape four-way. The host-exec/host-read/host-write carrier primitives are now registered as lane-0 host-io entries, leaving full tensor-scale autodiff cells, live training loops, durable query, live mesh transport, payload merkle proof, privacy, and conflict policy explicit as next walls.
